description:
You are a DevOps engineer who has been handed a single application log that lives at:
        /home/user/app/logs/app.log

    Your job is to perform three small but typical text-processing steps with awk and sed.  
    The automated grader will look **only** at the three output artefacts described below, so make sure they exist with *exactly* the required names, paths, contents and ordering.

    1. Extract every line that contains the string “ERROR” (uppercase, exact match) from /home/user/app/logs/app.log and write those lines, in their original order, to:
            /home/user/app/logs/errors.log

    2. Using awk, build a tab-separated summary of how many times each distinct numeric error code appears inside errors.log.  
       • Each ERROR line in the source file has the form “ERROR <code> …”, e.g. “ERROR 404 …”.  
       • Parse that integer code and count occurrences of each unique value.  
       • Write the summary to a new file:
            /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.tsv
       • The file must have **no header row**.  
       • Each line must be exactly:
            <code><TAB><count>
       • Sort the lines by the numeric code in ascending order before writing.

       Example of the required on-disk format (spacing shown with ␉ for TAB):
            403␉1
            404␉2
            500␉2

       Do not add trailing spaces or extra blank lines.

    3. Produce an anonymised version of errors.log in which every IPv4 address has its last octet replaced with the single character “x”.  
       • For example, “192.168.1.55” must become “192.168.1.x”.  
       • Preserve everything else, including timestamps and spacing.  
       • Save the result to:
            /home/user/app/logs/errors_anon.log

    When you are done, the directory /home/user/app/logs/ **must contain exactly these three new files** (errors.log, errors_anon.log, error_summary.tsv) in addition to the original app.log.  
    The grader will:  
       • Confirm that errors.log has only the ERROR lines in original order.  
       • Confirm that errors_anon.log matches errors.log byte-for-byte except for the final octet of each IPv4 address (which must be the letter “x”).  
       • Confirm that error_summary.tsv contains the correct tab-separated counts and is sorted numerically ascending.

    You may use any combination of awk and sed commands, pipelines or temporary files as you prefer, but do not rename or move the final three artefacts and do not modify app.log.

    Hint: grep is allowed but not required; however the grader will still look for the exact file contents described above, not for the commands you used.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing file placed for the agent -->
    File: /home/user/app/logs/app.log
    Contents (8 lines):

    2023-08-10 12:00:01 INFO 100 RequestID=abc123 User=alice IP=192.168.1.10 Successful login
    2023-08-10 12:05:47 ERROR 500 RequestID=def456 User=bob IP=10.0.0.42 NullPointerException at line 42
    2023-08-10 12:07:33 WARN 300 RequestID=ghi789 User=carol IP=172.16.5.3 Slow response
    2023-08-10 12:12:11 ERROR 404 RequestID=jkl012 User=dave IP=192.168.1.55 Resource not found /favicon.ico
    2023-08-10 12:15:27 ERROR 500 RequestID=mno345 User=erin IP=10.0.0.99 NullPointerException at line 87
    2023-08-10 12:15:28 INFO 100 RequestID=pqr678 User=frank IP=172.16.5.3 Logout
    2023-08-10 12:18:00 ERROR 403 RequestID=stu901 User=gina IP=192.168.1.10 Forbidden access to /admin
    2023-08-10 12:19:15 ERROR 404 RequestID=vwx234 User=henry IP=192.168.1.55 Resource not found /robots.txt

    -------------------------------------------------------------------
    Expected artefacts after correct completion:

    1) /home/user/app/logs/errors.log   (5 lines):
       2023-08-10 12:05:47 ERROR 500 RequestID=def456 User=bob IP=10.0.0.42 NullPointerException at line 42
       2023-08-10 12:12:11 ERROR 404 RequestID=jkl012 User=dave IP=192.168.1.55 Resource not found /favicon.ico
       2023-08-10 12:15:27 ERROR 500 RequestID=mno345 User=erin IP=10.0.0.99 NullPointerException at line 87
       2023-08-10 12:18:00 ERROR 403 RequestID=stu901 User=gina IP=192.168.1.10 Forbidden access to /admin
       2023-08-10 12:19:15 ERROR 404 RequestID=vwx234 User=henry IP=192.168.1.55 Resource not found /robots.txt

    2) /home/user/app/logs/errors_anon.log   (5 lines):
       2023-08-10 12:05:47 ERROR 500 RequestID=def456 User=bob IP=10.0.0.x NullPointerException at line 42
       2023-08-10 12:12:11 ERROR 404 RequestID=jkl012 User=dave IP=192.168.1.x Resource not found /favicon.ico
       2023-08-10 12:15:27 ERROR 500 RequestID=mno345 User=erin IP=10.0.0.x NullPointerException at line 87
       2023-08-10 12:18:00 ERROR 403 RequestID=stu901 User=gina IP=192.168.1.x Forbidden access to /admin
       2023-08-10 12:19:15 ERROR 404 RequestID=vwx234 User=henry IP=192.168.1.x Resource not found /robots.txt

    3) /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.tsv   (3 lines, tab-separated):
       403<TAB>1
       404<TAB>2
       500<TAB>2
